untranslatable_reason: This signal is a regime filter (AVOID/SKIP trading) rather than entry/exit rules. It requires: (1) MA slope calculation over 10 bars which requires multi-bar historical comparison not supported by allowed operators, (2) support/resistance band detection which requires dynamic level identification not in the allowed indicator set, (3) price crossing MA on both sides within 5 bars which requires multi-bar pattern matching. The position_size_multiplier of 0.0 indicates this should reduce or skip trades entirely during RANGING regime, but the backtest engine schema requires explicit entry/exit conditions rather than position sizing modifiers.
translation_notes: Signal GRIMES_DRY_2_0 is fundamentally a regime-based trade avoidance rule. To implement: (1) detect RANGING regime using adx_14 < 20 or bb_bandwidth < threshold, (2) apply position_size_multiplier = 0.0 as a portfolio-level rule rather than individual trade entry/exit, (3) alternatively, use entry_long/entry_short with regime check 'is RANGING' combined with entry rejection logic if supported by backtest engine.
